Hero.title: Need help with your administrative paperwork?
Hero.description: I help you fill out your forms, understand your mail, and assert your rights. Simple, fast, and jargon-free assistance.

Services.title: What I Do For You
Services.subtitle: Tailored support to simplify your daily life and your interactions with government agencies.
Services.service1Desc: Help with preparing files and completing complex administrative forms.
Services.service2Desc: Monitor the progress of your requests and follow up with relevant organizations.
Services.service3Desc: Assistance with your declarations and applications on government platforms (CAF, taxes, Ameli...).
Services.service4Desc: Guidance to the right contacts and structures suited to your specific situation.
Services.service5Desc: Phone contact with public services to resolve a situation or obtain information.
Services.service6Desc: Translation of complex administrative letters into plain language and help with drafting responses.

HowItWorks.title: How Does It Work?
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple and transparent process designed to help you quickly.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: By phone or message, briefly explain your needs.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: We evaluate the situation together and I propose a tailored and priced solution.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: I take care of the procedures. You are informed at every important step.

Pricing.title: Pricing For Everyone
Pricing.subtitle: Transparent and affordable prices so that administrative help is not a luxury.
Pricing.description: A clear and free quote will always be provided before any intervention. No surprises.
Pricing.cta: Contact Me for a Free Quote

Contact.title: Contact Me
Contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out for any questions or to schedule an initial assessment appointment.
Contact.hoursExtra: Contact me to schedule a time slot

Footer.description: Independent Social Worker. Support with your daily administrative procedures.
